title: Money Minute Daily | Jun 30 — BlackRock Downgrades Emerging-Market Equities Over
description: Emerging markets, once the darling of investors, are taking a backseat as one of the world's largest asset managers sounds the alarm on AI risks. BlackRock Inc.'s research arm has become cautious on emerging-market stocks, and it's a significant shift in sentiment that matters to investors worldwide. The reason for this caution is the rapidly evolving landscape of artificial intelligence and its potential to disrupt traditional industries and economies. title: Money News Jun 30 — Quant funds just suffered their most cripplin
description: Quant funds are reeling after their worst trading rout of the year, with momentum stocks taking a beating in the last week, but before you hit the panic button, it's essential to take a step back and look at the bigger picture. Although the recent slump has been painful for quant funds, asset allocators are reminding investors that it's crucial to assess returns over a wider timeframe, and so far in 2026, the sector is still significantly ahead of the S&P 500 and U.S. Treasurys. title: Money News Jun 29 — PBOC’s New Overnight Rate Said Below Forecast
description: China's central bank just made a surprise move that could have major implications for the global economy, setting the interest rate on its new overnight liquidity tool lower than expected, effectively giving the market a de facto rate cut. This means that market borrowing costs could be pushed down, and some economists are interpreting this as a sign that China is looking to ease its monetary policy. Why does this matter? title: Money News Jun 29 — Risks in Focus After US Stocks’ Wild Start to
description: The first half of 2026 has been nothing short of a wild ride for US stocks, and as we head into the second half of the year, investors are facing a daunting list of risks that could make or break their portfolios. From the rising tide of interest rates to the looming US elections and the unpredictable impact of artificial intelligence, it's a complex web of challenges that's keeping even the most seasoned investors on their toes.
